creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #12)

This will require updating devel/gnulibiberty to 2.40, first, then update it to 2.43 in lockstep with binutils. (Probably makes sense if I get blanket commit approval for that port.)

Another thought, we should probably create a wiki page to list the other ports that need to be updated in lockstep with binutils as well.

Regarding elf-dissector, we're still at version 0.0.1. Upstream doesn't list any versions though there was a commit to it a month ago.
